_comment: PROPOSAL ONLY — not wired into CI. Seed inventory for the planned Phase 3 JsxText/StringLiteral ratchet. Mirrors the no-clinical-copy-baseline.json pattern. 960 entries across 92 files as of 2026-05-30.

apps/mobile/src/app/(app)/shelf/[subject.literal: This book has ${startedLabel}. Deleting it will also delete those topics, their learning history, progress, and notes.
You can re-add it later. If any topics have been started, you will be asked before those topics and their learning history are deleted too.

apps/mobile/src/app/preview/value-prop.t.literal: A back-and-forth conversation that follows what you actually need — not a fixed lesson plan.
You set up your child, they learn, and you get a short weekly read on what they're working on. No surveillance, just signal.
Practiced quadratic equations for 45 minutes across three sessions. Getting comfortable with factoring; working on completing the square.
Sample data — your child's real insights appear after their first session.
